jsonLd.title: Licious is Hiring: E-commerce Executive (Junior)
jsonLd.description:
Grow your career with Licious! We are hiring a E-commerce Executive for our Raipur team. Be part of a workplace that celebrates innovation, diversity, and performance.

About Licious:
Licious is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Manage email marketing campaigns and push notifications
• Manage product listings, pricing, and promotions on the platform
• Coordinate with vendors and suppliers for inventory management
• Manage customer reviews, ratings, and return/refund processes
• Optimize product pages for search visibility and conversion
• Analyze sales data and customer behavior to drive revenue growth
• Develop and implement category growth strategies

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Com / M.Com / MBA Finance
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Product Management
• Proficiency in Customer Segmentation
• Proficiency in CRM Software
• Proficiency in Affiliate Marketing
• Proficiency in Influencer Marketing
• Proficiency in Performance Marketing
• Proficiency in Email Marketing
• Proficiency in Supply Chain

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Life and accident insurance
• Referral bonus program
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Flexible working hours
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Raipur, Chhattisgarh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Licious!
